chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-1323 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.5844/2023 (1 Rule 10) 2. For orders on CMA NO.6599/2023 (151 CPC) 3. For hearing of CMA No.5603/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 30-04-2025 Mr. Shahid Ali Memon, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sadar Uddin Lashari, Advocate for the respondent No.7 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing at some length, counsel for the petitioner submits that he will be satisfied and would not press the instant petition, if he is permitted to file appeal/representation under 161 of Regulations. Such proposal has not been opposed by the learned AAG and counsel for respondent No.7. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed, along with listed applications with direction to the respondents that if the petitioner approaches them and files a representation under 161 of the Regulation within seven days, the same shall be decided within fifteen days, after hearing all the concerned parties. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
